title: Danger Mario Enchanted Glint
description: Danger Mario Glint, A smoother, cleaner enchant glint for that Marlow-style gameplay feel.
body:
# Marlow Enchanted Glint
This texture pack smooths out Minecraft’s default enchant glint, giving it a clean, subtle, and minimal visual effect—perfect for PvP, competitive gameplay, and recording. Inspired by the smooth visual style of Marlow, this version removes the harsh, flashing shimmer and replaces it with a soft, sleek glint that doesn’t distract during fights.
- This pack is not from Marlow directly; I recreated the look using my own design approach.
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/OK51hHL0gjw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Compatibility
- Tested on: 1.21.4 – 1.21 (Main version: 1.21+)
- Other versions: Not tested

## Requirements
- No mods required. This pack works on vanilla Minecraft.

## Credits
- Pack created by **[_Melted](https://modrinth.com/user/_Melted)**.
- Inspired by World Biggest Fraud (Marlow).
